name: each stack entry is a provenance object carrying the four required keys added_at, namespace, source, trigger
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "a credentialing platform" --stack-add aws --stack-add react --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'c=JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["workload_classification"]; s=c["stack"]; exit(s.map{|e|e["namespace"]}==["aws","react"] && s.all?{|e|e.keys.sort==["added_at","namespace","source","trigger"]} ? 0:1)' && echo stack-entry-shape 1>&2
